title: DocModelResponse
description: doc-model contract (DocModel pivot — SSOT spec: aidlc-docs/construction/shared/docmodel.md; gate: construction/plans/docmodel-foundation-pivot-plan.md, D1/D2/D4/D6/D8). The ROOT schema is DocModelResponse — the union (oneOf) returned by getDocModel and branched by U5 ApiClient to surface status (ok | building | license_unavailable | source_unavailable). The bare DocModel artifact (the JSON stored at doc-model/{paperId}/v{version}.json and consumed as the U7 summary input) is defined at #/$defs/DocModel. STATUS: PROVISIONAL (owning unit U1 FD in progress). Trace: FR-12, FR-17, BR-30, BR-S2.

DocModelRequest.title: DocModelRequest
DocModelRequest.description: Request to fetch (and lazily build+cache on miss) the doc-model for a paper version. Trace: BR-30 (lazy on-demand + (paperId, version) cache), D6.

version.description: Paper version; doc-model cache key is (paperId, version). Trace: D6, BR-30.

DocModelResultDTO.title: DocModelResultDTO
DocModelResultDTO.description: Successful response carrying the structured doc-model. Trace: D4 (self rich-view render), BR-S2 (summary input).

cached.description: True if served from the (paperId, version) cache; false if built on this request (lazy). Trace: D6, BR-30.

BuildingDTO.title: BuildingDTO
BuildingDTO.description: The doc-model is being built asynchronously (lazy on-demand, D6/BR-30): a cache miss enqueued a build job and the client should poll getDocModel again after retryAfterMs. Distinct from source_unavailable (a build that ran and failed every source tier) — building is transient/in-flight. Trace: BR-30, BR-S8 (async job), D6.

retryAfterMs.description: Suggested client poll backoff in milliseconds before re-requesting.

LicenseUnavailableDTO.title: LicenseUnavailableDTO
LicenseUnavailableDTO.description: OA license does not permit in-app rich rendering of this paper; client links out to arXiv instead. Trace: BR-SF-11, SEC-9.

reason.description: Non-technical reason for the license gate (display copy).

arxivUrl.description: Safe arXiv link-out target (http/https). Trace: BR-U5-7.

SourceUnavailableDTO.title: SourceUnavailableDTO
SourceUnavailableDTO.description: doc-model could not be produced from any source tier (HTML/ar5iv/e-print/PDF all failed). Trace: Q6 fallback ladder.

DocModel.title: DocModel
DocModel.description: The structured paper artifact: a nested section tree of typed content blocks. Tables are DATA (rows/cols), formulas are LaTeX, figures/table-images are webp references by assetId (pixels are NOT embedded — base64 bloat avoided; reuse assets/{paperId}/{version}/{assetId}.webp). Deterministic: same source HTML -> same DocModel (LLM extraction forbidden). Trace: D1, D8, P7.

sections.description: Top-level sections in reading order; each may nest subsections (recursive). The rich-view DocTOC and the summary map-reduce split (P3) both consume this tree. Trace: Q1-decision (nested section tree).

version.description: Paper version; doc-model is keyed (paperId, version). Trace: D6.

title.description: Paper title (rendered as document title in the rich view).

abstract.description: Optional abstract plain text (translate task uses the abstract directly; rich view shows it). Trace: BR-S2.

Provenance.title: Provenance
Provenance.description: How this doc-model was produced — for cache invalidation, debugging, and coverage telemetry. No PII (SEC-3).

parserVersion.description: Deterministic parser build identifier; bumping it invalidates cached doc-models. Trace: BR-30, TD-16.

schemaVersion.description: doc-model schema version for additive evolution (consumers ignore unknown fields). Trace: shared/README Versioning.

SourceTier.description: Which rung of the fallback ladder produced this doc-model: native arXiv HTML -> ar5iv -> e-print LaTeX -> (last resort) PDF parse. Trace: Q6, BR-29, TD-11.

Section.title: Section
Section.description: A heading-delimited section. `id` is the deterministic anchor handle (see Anchor binding in the spec). Subsections recurse via `sections`. Trace: Q1-decision (nested tree), Q2-decision (block id anchors).

id.description: Deterministic section id / anchor handle, e.g. "s3", "s3.2". Stable across rebuilds of the same source (P7). Anchor.target may reference this id. Trace: Q2-decision, BR-S7.

title.description: Heading text; may be empty when source headings are absent (span-only section). Trace: BR-S3 (section derivation).

blocks.description: Ordered content blocks directly in this section (before any subsection).

Block.title: Block
Block.description: A content block, discriminated by `type`. Headings are NOT blocks — they are carried by Section.title.

ParagraphBlock.title: ParagraphBlock
ParagraphBlock.description: Body text. Inline mathematics is embedded as LaTeX delimited by \( ... \) within `text` (KaTeX renders it; the summary prompt and agents read the LaTeX verbatim). Trace: D1.

id.description: Deterministic block id / anchor handle, e.g. "s3.p2". Trace: Q2-decision.

text.description: Paragraph text; may contain inline LaTeX in \( ... \) delimiters. Rendered escaped except for trusted KaTeX (SEC-5).

TableBlock.title: TableBlock
TableBlock.description: A table as STRUCTURED DATA (rows/cols), NOT a cropped image — so table numbers are visible to the summary LLM, grounding numeric-match, and agents (D8). A crop image may be carried in `assetRef` ONLY as a last-resort fallback (e.g. pdf source tier). Trace: D8, TD-12.

id.description: Deterministic block id / anchor handle, e.g. "s3.tbl2". Trace: Q2-decision.

caption.description: Table caption text (preserved — a results-number source). Trace: BR-S3 (preserve captions).

anchorLabel.description: Human label as it appears in the paper, e.g. "Table 3" — used by the asset-anchor matcher and AnchorChip display. Trace: FR-12.

rows.description: All rows in order; header rows are marked via cell.isHeader.

assetRef.description: Optional table crop image (page-crop fallback only). The PRIMARY representation is `rows` data; this is a degraded fallback for non-HTML sources. Trace: TD-11 (last-resort), D8.

TableCell.title: TableCell
TableCell.description: A table cell. `text` may contain inline LaTeX in \( ... \) delimiters.

text.description: Cell content as text (inline LaTeX allowed).

FormulaBlock.title: FormulaBlock
FormulaBlock.description: A display (block-level) equation as LaTeX. Inline math lives in ParagraphBlock.text instead. Trace: D1.

id.description: Deterministic block id / anchor handle, e.g. "s3.eq2". Trace: Q2-decision.

latex.description: LaTeX (converted from source MathML when needed; HTML-borne <math> coverage ~94% per Q1 spike). Rendered by KaTeX/MathJax. Trace: D1, TD-16.

display.description: Always true for a FormulaBlock (display/block equation); present for renderer clarity.

anchorLabel.description: Equation number as in the paper, e.g. "(3)".

mathmlSource.description: Optional original MathML, retained for fidelity/debugging.

FigureBlock.title: FigureBlock
FigureBlock.description: A figure: a webp image referenced by assetId (pixels reused from the FR-17 assets pipeline; reuses U5 AssetGallery + asset-anchor matcher for render). Trace: FR-17, D5.

id.description: Deterministic block id / anchor handle, e.g. "s3.fig1". Trace: Q2-decision.

anchorLabel.description: Human label, e.g. "Figure 2" — used by the asset-anchor matcher. Trace: FR-12.

ListBlock.title: ListBlock
ListBlock.description: An ordered or unordered list. Nested lists are an additive future extension.

text.description: List item text; inline LaTeX allowed in \( ... \) delimiters.

CodeBlock.title: CodeBlock
CodeBlock.description: A verbatim/code/algorithm block (rendered monospace, not interpreted).

AssetRef.title: AssetRef
AssetRef.description: A REFERENCE to a stored image asset — assetId, not pixels and not an object_ref. The read API (getDocModel / GET /api/papers/{id}/assets) issues a short-lived signed URL at read time; the doc-model artifact never stores the URL or object_ref (SEC-9). Mirrors the existing AssetRef in summarization.schema.json minus the runtime-only `url`. Trace: FR-17, SEC-9, D8/D5.

assetId.description: Deterministic asset id keying assets/{paperId}/{version}/{assetId}.webp and the paper_asset row. Trace: FR-17.

ordinal.description: Display order within its type (figure/table). Trace: FR-17.

caption.description: Caption (mirrors the parent block caption; convenience for asset-only views).

sourceMode.description: How the image was obtained: structured graphic extraction or page-crop fallback. Trace: TD-11/TD-12.
